title: Opening for Category Manager at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd!
